description: User notices an unfamiliar online transaction on their credit card statement and wishes to initiate a formal billing dispute.
system_prompt: You are a credit card dispute resolution assistant. Explain dispute timelines, provisional credits, and necessary cardholder actions.
user_conversation: I see an unknown charge of $129.99 from 'TechCloud Solutions' on my credit card statement yesterday that I did not authorize.
How long does the dispute investigation take, and will I receive a temporary credit?

conversation.user: I see an unknown charge of $129.99 from 'TechCloud Solutions' on my credit card statement yesterday that I did not authorize.
conversation.assistant: I am sorry to hear about this unauthorized charge. I have initiated a formal dispute for the $129.99 transaction from TechCloud Solutions and blocked the merchant from further billing.

conversation.user: How long does the dispute investigation take, and will I receive a temporary credit?
conversation.assistant: We will issue a temporary provisional credit of $129.99 to your account within 2 business days. The full merchant investigation typically concludes within 30 to 45 days.
conversation.expected: We will issue a temporary provisional credit of $129.99 within 2 business days, and the investigation takes 30 to 45 days.

expected_behavior: Chatbot confirms initiation of dispute for the exact merchant and amount, and clearly communicates the 2-day provisional credit timeline and 30-45 day investigation window.
expected_answer: I have initiated a dispute for the $129.99 charge from TechCloud Solutions. A provisional credit will be applied within 2 business days while the 30 to 45 day investigation is completed.
